blocks.text:
Newcastle R16 → **Barcelona** (my 0.45/0.45) — correct but only +1.6 due to time-weighting (predicted just 2 days before resolution; late predictions cover few days). TW **1603.20** (day 63). 

Key insight reinforced: **early predictions accrue more days = more TW**. Let me check whether any long-active questions remain unpredicted (scoring 0 daily) and worth a guess.

input.command:
cd /lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_opus48_r00/26-06-05-02-36-11/agents/minimalHarness_claude-opus-4-8_001/workspace
# Gather all qids I've predicted from predictions/ files
python3 -c "
import json, glob, csv
csv.field_size_limit(10000000)
predicted=set()
for f in sorted(glob.glob('predictions/*.json')):
    try:
        data=json.load(open(f))
        for e in data:
            predicted.add(str(e.get('question_id')))
    except Exception as ex:
        pass
print('Distinct qids predicted (from files):', len(predicted))
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('market.csv')))
# active = not resolved; but resolution happened in sim. Use resolution_date > today (2026-02-26) as proxy for still-active
active_unpred=[]
for r in rows:
    if r['qid'] not in predicted and r['resolution_date'] >= '2026-02-26':
        active_unpred.append((r['resolution_date'], r['qid'], r['title'][:70]))
active_unpred.sort()
print('ACTIVE (res>=Feb26) UNPREDICTED:', len(active_unpred))
for d,q,t in active_unpred: print(f'{q}|{d}|{t}')
"
